headline: Assessing Franklin Resources (BEN) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Performance
summary: Recent performance snapshot Franklin Resources (BEN) has drawn fresh attention after a period of solid stock performance, with the share price up about 32% year to date and about 51% over the past year. Over shorter horizons, the stock is up about 1% over the past week, around 1% over the past month, and about 22% over the past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess what is currently priced in.
